channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: Airstrike on Kabul hospital kills 400: How peace remains elusive between Pakistan and Afghanistan
FirstUp: Zelenskyy to visit UK, SC to hear arguments on definition of ‘industry’...The news today
Is AI really killing tech jobs? What the evidence shows
Can ChatGPT help create vaccines for diseases?
Why is France sending its aircraft carrier to war-torn West Asia?
Is Donald Trump a time traveller? What fuels this viral theory
How Houthis backing Iran could trigger a double chokepoint crisis
item.description: With threats looming over the Strait of Hormuz and the Bab-el-Mandeb Strait, an Iran-Houthi axis could imperil the world’s most vital oil shipping lanes and trigger a major global energy shock

item.title: India has now reached a level of influence in West Asia where its voice has real impact: Pramit Pal Chaudhuri
item.description: ‘Our ties with UAE are at a different level; it is the cornerstone of India’s new Gulf policy’, says Eurasia Group’s head for South Asia

item.title: From Gulf to Iran: How China learns and transforms from America’s wars
item.description: The Chinese People’s Liberation Army transformed itself after witnessing the First Gulf War, which exposed the power of American high-tech warfare. Today, Beijing is once again studying the Iran war to draw lessons for a future conflict with the US in the Indo-Pacific

item.title: Balen Shah’s premiership: A test of governance and diplomatic balancing for Nepal
item.description: The real challenge for Balen Shah’s government will be converting a historic electoral mandate into effective governance at home while carefully balancing Nepal’s relations with India, China and the US

item.title: How the Iran war is acquiring global dimensions
item.description: What began as a regional confrontation is steadily transforming into a test of the international order itself that is challenging alliances, disrupting markets and forcing major powers to reconsider their strategic assumptions

item.title: How China’s cautious diplomacy in West Asia reveals a broader strategy
item.description: Beijing wants to avoid being drawn into a confrontation with Washington while still demonstrating that it has an independent voice on major international crises
